title: phegopteris latealata
intro: Phegopteris latealata, also known as the Lateral Lady Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The Lateral Lady Fern is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. In herbal preparations, Phegopteris latealata is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
